name: Butter Pecan Crunch
recipeIngredient: 1 quart softened butter pecan ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the crumbs and butter.
Pat into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Chill.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the pudding mix and milk until well blended, about 1 minute.
Fold in the ice cream and whipped topping. Spoon over the crust.
3. Sprinkle with crushed candy bars.
4. Freeze.
5. Thaw for 20 minutes before serving.
